evals.prompt: Test PR #42 in this repo - it adds a new authentication module
evals.expected_output: Skill fetches PR #42, analyzes changed files, generates tests for auth module, runs tests with coverage, runs quality checks, and posts a report as PR comment

evals.prompt: Can you generate tests for pull request #123? It's a Python project with pytest.
evals.expected_output: Skill detects Python/pytest, fetches PR #123, generates appropriate pytest tests, runs them with coverage, and posts results

evals.prompt: Review PR #7 for testing needs - it's a Node.js API change
evals.expected_output: Skill detects Node.js, analyzes API changes, generates Jest/Vitest tests, runs them, and posts coverage + quality report
